title: Cognitive Warfare — counter-intelligence doctrine, operationalized into analytical instruments
public_claim: A combined counter-intelligence and cognitive-warfare doctrine page.
distinctive_mechanism: Each of the three doctrinal authorities is paired with its constructive operationalization — not "what does Olson say" but "what analytical move does Olson's principle enable and what failure mode does it catch." Olson Olson principles, constructively operationalized Each Olson CI principle paired with the analytical move it enables and the failure mode it catches. The operationalization is what turns the principles into instruments.
